texto: Go to sleep, dweller-baby. I’ll kill Elowin as soon as we find her.” He didn’t sound like he was kidding. Each word was low and laced with truth.“Next time, just say like … sleep well, or something normal,” I said. “Not go to sleep, I’ll be murdering someone in no time. It doesn’t sound as comforting as you think it does.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jaymin Eve: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Go to sleep, dweller-baby. I’ll kill Elowin as soon as we find her.” He didn’t sound like he was …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, comforting, funny pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de funny e normal.

frase_original: Go to sleep, dweller-baby. I’ll kill Elowin as soon as we find her.” He didn’t sound like he was kidding. Each word was low and laced with truth.“Next time, just say like … sleep well, or something normal,” I said. “Not go to sleep, I’ll be murdering someone in no time. It doesn’t sound as comforting as you think it does.

texto: It’s the same as when I broke the melding bond. Our love doesn’t trump the millions of people in the seven worlds. We must think of the greater good.”He pulled back from me and before I could blink he held my chin in his gentle grip. “And I will tell you again, Abigail, that nothing trumps our love. Nothing.

texto: I still didn’t turn. Instead, I just listened really hard. I couldn’t tell where he was standing anymore, but I could sense that he was still there somewhere. Well obviously … because he didn’t exactly jump out of the window.
explicacao: Citação de Jaymin Eve sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I still didn’t turn. Instead, I just listened really hard. I couldn’t tell where he was standing …” articula humor, embarrassed, funny em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como funny e obvious.
